title: Deere & Co mower production to move from Iowa to Mexico plant
text: U.S. farm equipment maker Deere & Co will be moving production of mower conditioners, which are tractor attachments with rolling discs to cut and crush hay, from a factory in Ottumwa, Iowa, to an existing plant in Mexico over the next 18 months, the company said.

title: Deere: A Very Favorable Risk/Reward Thanks To Strong Agriculture Fundamentals
text: In this article, I start by explaining why agriculture fundamentals provide a healthy bull case for Deere, as the world is poised to see long-term elevated crop prices.
